title: XTRM Policy
description: Canonical enforcement policy definition. Compiled by scripts/compile-policies.mjs to hooks/hooks.json (Claude) and Pi extension registry.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this policy enforces

runtime.description: Which runtimes this policy targets. Default: both

order.description: Relative ordering when multiple policies contribute hooks to the same event+matcher group. Lower runs first. Default: 50.

event.description: Claude Code hook event name (e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact)

matcher.description: Tool name pattern (pipe-separated). Omit for unconditional hooks.

command.description: Shell command to run. Use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} for portable paths.

extension.description: Path to the Pi extension TypeScript file (relative to repo root)

events.description: Pi event names this extension handles (informational)
